title: Pelargonium lineare
taxonomy: Pelargonium lineare is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It is a member of the genus Pelargonium, which is a group of succulent plants commonly known as geraniums or storksbills. The family Geraniaceae is a small family of flowering plants, often classified under the larger order of Geraniales. The order Geraniales is part of the larger clade of eurosids, which includes a wide variety of flowering plants. The classification of Pelargonium lineare reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the broader plant kingdom.
